As filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission on January 9, 2024.

AMENDMENT NO. 8 TO FORM S-1

iSHARES BITCOIN TRUST

(Exact name of Registrant as specified in its charter)

PROSPECTUS

iShares Bitcoin Trust

The Shares will be listed and traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol "IBIT." Market prices for the Shares may be different from the NAV.
